title: lilium macrophyllum
intro: Lilium macrophyllum, also known as the large-flowered lily or western lily, is a species of flowering plant in the lily family (Liliaceae) that is native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Lilium macrophyllum include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function. The plant is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or oil, and is used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
